comment: Comprehensive content database extracted from MoneyCal sitemap.xml - 100+ real URLs

priority_festival_tools.title: Akshaya Tritiya 2025 Shubh Muhurat - Best Time to Buy Gold in Your City
priority_festival_tools.description: Find exact Abhijit Muhurat for gold buying! Complete with historical gold prices (₹47K to ₹78K growth), Rahu Kaal timings, live countdown, and city-wise calculations for 30+ Indian cities. The entire day is auspicious - no muhurat needed!

priority_festival_tools.title: Complete Puja Vidhi Generator - 10+ Hindu Rituals in Hindi & English
priority_festival_tools.description: Step-by-step puja procedures for Lakshmi, Ganesha, Shiva, Durga, Krishna & more! Get complete samagri lists, sacred mantras with transliteration, regional variations, and interactive progress tracking. Available in both Hindi and English!

priority_festival_tools.title: Chhath Puja 2025 Arghya Time Finder - Sandhya & Usha Arghya Timings
priority_festival_tools.description: Get precise Sandhya Arghya sunset (5:36 PM) and Usha Arghya sunrise (6:20 AM) times for 50+ cities including Bihar, Jharkhand, UP. Complete 4-day schedule with 36-hour Nirjala fast guide for Chhath Puja!

priority_festival_tools.title: Diwali 2025 Date Finder - Complete 5-Day Schedule with Lakshmi Puja Muhurat
priority_festival_tools.description: Get complete Diwali 2025 schedule: Dhanteras, Naraka Chaturdashi, Lakshmi Puja (Oct 20), Govardhan Puja, Bhai Dooj. Includes city-wise Lakshmi puja muhurat timings and live countdown!

priority_festival_tools.title: Navratri 2025 Dates & 9-Day Color Guide - Complete Durga Puja Schedule
priority_festival_tools.description: Complete Navratri calendar with daily goddess forms (Shailputri to Siddhidatri), specific colors for each day, offerings, and Kanya Puja timings. Includes Durga Saptashati reading schedule!

top_calculators.title: SIP Calculator 2025 - Calculate Mutual Fund Returns with Inflation Adjustment
top_calculators.description: See how ₹5,000/month becomes ₹50 lakhs in 15 years at 12% returns! Advanced SIP calculator with year-by-year breakdown, wealth accumulation graph, and goal-based planning. Start your investment journey today!

top_calculators.title: EMI Calculator 2025 - Home Loan, Car Loan & Personal Loan EMI Calculator
top_calculators.description: Calculate monthly EMI for any loan in seconds! Get complete amortization schedule, total interest payable, and prepayment savings. Compare different loan tenures and interest rates instantly.

top_calculators.title: Income Tax Calculator 2025-26 - New vs Old Tax Regime Comparison
top_calculators.description: Calculate your income tax for FY 2025-26! Compare old vs new tax regime, get personalized recommendations, and find deductions to save maximum tax. Updated with latest Budget 2025 changes!

top_calculators.title: HRA Calculator - Calculate House Rent Allowance Tax Exemption Accurately
top_calculators.description: Maximize your HRA tax benefits! Calculate eligible tax exemption on house rent allowance based on salary, rent paid, and city classification (Metro/Non-Metro). Save thousands in taxes!

top_calculators.title: PPF Calculator 2025 - Public Provident Fund Returns & Maturity Calculator
top_calculators.description: Calculate PPF maturity value with current 7.1% interest rate! Plan your 15-year investment journey with year-wise balance growth, total interest earned, and tax-free returns calculation.

top_calculators.title: FD Calculator - Fixed Deposit Interest Calculator with Bank Comparison
top_calculators.description: Calculate FD maturity amount and interest earnings instantly! Compare different tenure options, quarterly/monthly compounding, and find the best FD rates across major Indian banks.

top_calculators.title: GST Calculator India 2025 - Calculate CGST, SGST, IGST with Reverse GST
top_calculators.description: Calculate GST on any product or service! Supports all tax slabs (5%, 12%, 18%, 28%). Get CGST, SGST, IGST breakup, reverse GST calculation, and final invoice amount instantly.

finance_tools_advanced.title: SIP Delay Loss Calculator - See How Much You Lose by Waiting
finance_tools_advanced.description: Discover the real cost of procrastination! See how delaying your SIP by just 1 year costs you lakhs in future wealth. Every month delayed = less compounding magic. Start investing TODAY!

finance_tools_advanced.title: Lumpsum vs SIP Analyzer - Which Investment Strategy Works Best?
finance_tools_advanced.description: Should you invest a lump sum or start a SIP? Compare both strategies side-by-side with detailed analysis, market timing considerations, and risk-return profiles. Make data-driven investment decisions!

finance_tools_advanced.title: SIP Step-Up Planner - Increase SIP with Your Salary Hikes
finance_tools_advanced.description: Plan SIP increases annually to match income growth! See how stepping up your SIP by just 10% yearly can DOUBLE your final corpus. Smart way to build crores for retirement!

finance_tools_advanced.title: Portfolio Diversification Visualizer - Analyze Your Asset Allocation
finance_tools_advanced.description: Visualize your investment portfolio with beautiful interactive charts! Ensure proper diversification across equity, debt, gold, real estate for balanced risk-return and financial security.

finance_tools_advanced.title: XIRR Calculator - Calculate Returns on Irregular Investments (SIP/PPF)
finance_tools_advanced.description: Calculate ACTUAL returns when investing different amounts at different times! Perfect for SIPs, PPF, mutual funds with irregular investments. More accurate than simple CAGR!

tax_tools_essential.title: STCG vs LTCG Tax Calculator - Save Tax on Stock Market Gains
tax_tools_essential.description: Calculate tax on your stock profits! Understand Short-Term (15% tax) vs Long-Term (10% on gains > ₹1L) capital gains. Plan your selling strategy to minimize tax liability!

tax_tools_essential.title: Equity Tax Estimator 2025 - Complete Capital Gains Tax Calculator
tax_tools_essential.description: Estimate tax on equity investments comprehensively! Includes LTCG exemption of ₹1 lakh annually, STCG at 15%, and dividend taxation. Perfect for stock market investors!

tax_tools_essential.title: Old vs New Tax Regime Calculator - Which Saves You More Money?
tax_tools_essential.description: Compare old (with deductions) and new (lower rates) tax regimes! Get personalized recommendations based on your 80C, 80D, HRA, and other deductions. Save maximum tax legally!

government_schemes_popular.title: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi Yojana 2025 - Get ₹6,000 Direct Benefit
government_schemes_popular.description: Farmers! Get ₹2,000 × 3 installments (₹6,000/year) directly to your bank account. Check eligibility, application status, payment dates, and apply online through PM Kisan portal. 12+ crore farmers already benefiting!

government_schemes_popular.title: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana 2025 - Best Savings Scheme for Girl Child
government_schemes_popular.description: Secure your daughter's future! Get 8.2% tax-free returns (better than FD!). Invest ₹250-₹1.5L annually, mature amount after 21 years for education & marriage. Section 80C tax benefit included!

government_schemes_popular.title: Atal Pension Yojana - Guaranteed Monthly Pension ₹1,000 to ₹5,000
government_schemes_popular.description: Secure your retirement with government-guaranteed pension! Low monthly contributions (as low as ₹42/month), government co-contribution benefits, and assured pension for life. Join 5+ crore subscribers!

festival_tools_complete.title: Maha Shivratri 2025 Night Duration - 4 Prahar Timings for Shiva Puja
festival_tools_complete.description: Calculate exact night duration (12h 22m) from sunset to sunrise for all-night Shiva worship! Get all 4 prahar timings with specific ritual activities: milk abhishek, curd offering, honey abhishek, ghee abhishek.

festival_tools_complete.title: Guru Purnima 2025 Calendar - Purnima Tithi Timing & Puja Muhurat
festival_tools_complete.description: Honor your spiritual teachers on July 10, 2025! Get exact Purnima tithi start/end times, puja muhurat, fasting guidelines, and complete guide to Vyasa Purnima celebrations.

festival_tools_complete.title: Raksha Bandhan 2025 Muhurat - Bhadra-Free Rakhi Tying Time
festival_tools_complete.description: Find the perfect Bhadra-free time to tie rakhi on Aug 9, 2025! Avoid inauspicious Bhadra Kaal and celebrate brother-sister bond during most auspicious muhurat for maximum blessings.

festival_tools_complete.title: Janmashtami 2025 Fasting Calculator - Krishna Midnight Birth Time
festival_tools_complete.description: Calculate exact fasting duration (14+ hours) and Krishna's midnight birth timing for your city! Complete with breaking fast time after midnight aarti, Dahi Handi celebrations, and puja vidhi.

festival_tools_complete.title: Ganesh Chaturthi 2025 Countdown - 1.5 to 11-Day Puja Planner
festival_tools_complete.description: Plan your Ganpati celebration! Calculate visarjan dates for 1.5, 3, 5, 7, or 11-day puja. Includes eco-friendly idol tips, modak recipes, and aarti schedules.

festival_tools_complete.title: Dussehra 2025 Dates - Vijayadashami & Ravan Dahan Muhurat
festival_tools_complete.description: Celebrate victory of good over evil! Get Dussehra date (Oct 2, 2025), Ravan Dahan timing, Vijay Muhurat, Aparahna puja time for 50+ cities. Complete 10-day Navratri to Dussehra guide!

trending_calculators.title: Home Loan Calculator 2025 - EMI, Eligibility & Prepayment Calculator
trending_calculators.description: Planning to buy your dream home? Calculate EMI, check eligibility (up to 60× monthly salary), compare interest rates (8.5%-9.5%), and see prepayment benefits. Make smart home loan decisions!

trending_calculators.title: Retirement Calculator - How Much Do You Need to Retire Comfortably?
trending_calculators.description: Plan your golden years! Calculate retirement corpus needed based on current expenses, inflation, and life expectancy. See monthly savings required to retire with ₹1-5 crores!

trending_calculators.title: Car Loan EMI Calculator - Compare Auto Loan Options Across Banks
trending_calculators.description: Buying a car? Calculate EMI for your dream vehicle! Compare loan options, see total interest cost, down payment impact, and plan affordable monthly installments for 1-7 year tenure.

trending_calculators.title: NPS Calculator 2025 - National Pension System Returns Calculator
trending_calculators.description: Build retirement corpus with NPS! Calculate maturity amount, monthly pension, tax savings under Section 80CCD(1B), and see how ₹5,000/month grows to crores by age 60.

trending_calculators.title: Gratuity Calculator 2025 - Calculate Retirement Gratuity Amount
trending_calculators.description: Calculate your gratuity amount (Salary × Years × 15/26)! Understand eligibility after 5 years, maximum limit of ₹20 lakhs, and tax implications on gratuity payments.

trending_calculators.title: Mutual Fund Returns Calculator - Calculate MF Gains & CAGR
trending_calculators.description: Calculate your mutual fund profits! Get CAGR, absolute returns, XIRR for multiple investments, and compare fund performance. Track your wealth growth accurately!

insurance_tools.title: Term Insurance Calculator - Find Right Life Cover for Your Family
insurance_tools.description: How much life insurance do you need? Calculate ideal coverage based on Human Life Value method (10-15× annual income). Protect your family's financial future with adequate term insurance!

insurance_tools.title: Health Insurance Calculator - Find Adequate Medical Coverage
insurance_tools.description: Calculate health insurance needed for your family! Consider age, city (metro/non-metro), medical inflation, and family size. Don't underinsure - medical emergencies can cost lakhs!

crypto_finance.title: Cryptocurrency Tax Calculator India 2025 - Calculate 30% Crypto Tax
crypto_finance.description: Calculate tax on your crypto profits! Understand 30% flat tax on gains, 1% TDS on transactions, no loss offset rules. Stay compliant with Indian crypto tax regulations!

crypto_finance.title: How to Buy Bitcoin in India 2025 - Complete Step-by-Step Guide
crypto_finance.description: Start your crypto journey safely! Learn how to buy Bitcoin on Indian exchanges (WazirX, CoinDCX, ZebPay), KYC requirements, secure wallet setup, and investment strategies for beginners.

religious_spiritual.title: Hindu Festival Calendar 2025 - Complete List of All Dates & Timings
religious_spiritual.description: Never miss a festival! Complete calendar with dates for Diwali, Holi, Navratri, Ganesh Chaturthi, and 50+ Hindu festivals. Includes muhurat timings, significance, and regional variations across India.

religious_spiritual.title: Festival Shopping Planner - Budget Calculator for All Occasions
religious_spiritual.description: Plan festival expenses smartly! Track budgets for gifts, decorations, clothes, sweets, and puja samagri. Avoid overspending during Diwali, Holi, and other celebrations!

education_finance.title: What is SIP? Complete Beginner's Guide to Systematic Investment Plans
education_finance.description: New to investing? Learn everything about SIP! Understand how small monthly investments (₹500-₹10,000) create large wealth through rupee cost averaging and compounding. Start your financial freedom journey!

education_finance.title: Stock Market Basics for Beginners - Complete Investment Guide 2025
education_finance.description: Master stock market fundamentals! Learn about shares, demat account opening, trading vs investing, IPOs, dividends, and how to build a profitable stock portfolio from scratch.

astro_finance.title: Financial Horoscope 2025 - Money Predictions for All Zodiac Signs
astro_finance.description: Discover your financial prospects for 2025 by zodiac sign! Get personalized money predictions, lucky investment days, business opportunities, and wealth-building tips aligned with Vedic astrology.

astro_finance.title: Lucky Days for Investment 2025 - Zodiac-Based Trading Calendar
astro_finance.description: Find your lucky days for stock trading, gold buying, and major investments! Based on Vedic astrology, planetary positions, and your zodiac sign for maximum prosperity!
